option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.DialogPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<DialogPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="dk.easv.swiftdoc.controller.NewScanDialogController"> <headerText>Start a New Scan</headerText> <contentText>Configure your scanning session and begin digitalization.</contentText>
<content> <VBox spacing="16.0" style="-fx-padding: 16;"> <VBox spacing="10.0" style="-fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 12;"> <Label text="Scanning Profile" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> <HBox spacing="12.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Profile" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/> <ComboBox fx:id="profileComboBox" promptText="Select a profile..." maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" prefWidth="260.0" style="-fx-background-color: #f7f7f7; -fx-background-radius: 4; -fx-padding: 8;"> <Label text="Description" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Label fx:id="profileDescriptionLabel" text="Profile details will appear here" style="-fx-text-fill: #666666; -fx-font-size: 10;" wrapText="true"/> </VBox> </HBox> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="12.0"> <VBox spacing="8.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 12;"> <Label text="Box Information" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> <GridPane hgap="8.0" vgap="6.0"> <Label text="Box Name" style="-fx-font-size: 11;" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="boxNameTextField" promptText="Enter box name (e.g., 'Inbox 001')" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <Label fx:id="boxNameErrorLabel" text="" style="-fx-text-fill: #cc0000; -fx-font-size: 10;" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> </GridPane> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0" prefWidth="260.0" style="-fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 12;"> <Label text="Scan Options" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> <CheckBox fx:id="autoSplitCheckBox" text="Auto-split documents by barcode" selected="true"/> <CheckBox fx:id="duplicateDetectionCheckBox" text="Enable duplicate detection"/> <CheckBox fx:id="separateDocumentsCheckBox" text="Create separate document per page" selected="false"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0" style="-fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 12;"> <Label text="Notes (optional)" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> <TextArea fx:id="notesTextArea" prefRowCount="3" wrapText="true" promptText="Add any notes for this scanning session..."/> </VBox> </VBox> </content>
<buttons> <Button fx:id="startScanButton" text="Start Scan" style="-fx-padding: 8 25;"/> <Button fx:id="previewButton" text="Preview Settings"/> <Button fx:id="cancelButton" text="Cancel"/> </buttons> </DialogPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ButtonType?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.DialogPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<DialogPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="dk.easv.swiftdoc.controller.NewScanDialogController" fx:id="dialogPane"> <headerText>Start a New Scan</headerText> <contentText>Configure your scanning session and begin digitalization.</contentText>
<content> <VBox spacing="16.0" style="-fx-padding: 16;"> <VBox spacing="10.0" style="-fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 12;"> <Label text="Scanning Profile" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> <HBox spacing="12.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Profile" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/> <ComboBox fx:id="profileComboBox" promptText="Select a profile..." maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" prefWidth="260.0" style="-fx-background-color: #f7f7f7; -fx-background-radius: 4; -fx-padding: 8;"> <Label text="Description" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Label fx:id="profileDescriptionLabel" text="Profile details will appear here" style="-fx-text-fill: #666666; -fx-font-size: 10;" wrapText="true"/> </VBox> </HBox> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="12.0"> <VBox spacing="8.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 12;"> <Label text="Box Information" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> <GridPane hgap="8.0" vgap="6.0"> <Label text="Box Name" style="-fx-font-size: 11;" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="boxNameTextField" promptText="Enter box name (e.g., 'Inbox 001')" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <Label fx:id="boxNameErrorLabel" text="" style="-fx-text-fill: #cc0000; -fx-font-size: 10;" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> </GridPane> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0" prefWidth="260.0" style="-fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 12;"> <Label text="Scan Options" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> <CheckBox fx:id="autoSplitCheckBox" text="Auto-split documents by barcode" selected="true"/> <CheckBox fx:id="duplicateDetectionCheckBox" text="Enable duplicate detection"/> <CheckBox fx:id="separateDocumentsCheckBox" text="Create separate document per page" selected="false"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0" style="-fx-border-color: #e0e0e0; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 12;"> <Label text="Notes (optional)" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 12;"/> <TextArea fx:id="notesTextArea" prefRowCount="3" wrapText="true" promptText="Add any notes for this scanning session..."/> </VBox> </VBox> </content>
<buttonTypes> <ButtonType fx:id="startScanButtonType" text="Start Scan" buttonData="OK_DONE"/> <ButtonType fx:id="previewButtonType" text="Preview Settings" buttonData="OTHER"/> <ButtonType fx:id="cancelButtonType" text="Cancel" buttonData="CANCEL_CLOSE"/> </buttonTypes> </DialogPane>
